synopsis: On Andelm IV, the gangster Jaum and his Shistavanen henchman Tyvak write off the collapsed beetle mine, confident that with Imperial backing they can rebuild it into a slave-labor prison, though Jaum frets that Chewbacca somehow survived the blast. Trapped below, Chewbacca, Zarro, and her reunited father Arrax must escape before the power failure lets the poisonous Andelm beetles swarm back into the caverns. Chewbacca collapses a girder to hold off the beetles, then climbs a sinkhole and topples a great dead tree to open an escape route, hauling the miners to the surface. Arrax wants to flee offworld, but Zarro refuses to abandon her home and resolves to stop Jaum. In secret, she and Chewbacca visit her old friend Sevox to borrow gear and an old R5 droid for a plan against the gangster. Meanwhile, Jaum tortures a captured former worker, learns of the escape, and calls Imperial Commander Kai, offering beetle samples in exchange for stormtroopers and AT-ST walkers to crush the rebellious miners.
title: Chewbacca (2015) Part III
